assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 8) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 8 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)

The Step 8 mention uses this same account ID (557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id). No ProdSec configuration was involved — the account ID comes directly from the Jira issue's reporter field.

assertion_results.text: The Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3) includes an @mention of the ProdSec contact using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3), the ADF JSON contains a mention node at lines 124-131: {"type": "mention", "attrs": {"id": "557058:prodsec-mock-account-id", "text": "@prodsec-team"}}. This is a valid ADF mention node with the correct ProdSec account ID.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote in the Affects Versions correction comment (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md, the ProdSec mention node (lines 124-131) appears before the rule separator (line 134) and the Comment Footnote paragraph 'This comment was AI-generated by sdlc-workflow/triage-security v0.12.2.' (lines 136-160). Order is: mention -> rule -> footnote.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec Jira account ID from the Security Configuration is successfully extracted and used in the Affects Versions correction comment — evidenced by the @mention with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' in Step 3 output (Step 0 config extraction → Step 3 usage)
assertion_results.evidence: The affects-versions.md (Step 3) contains the @mention with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id'. This ID is distinct from the reporter's ID ('557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id'), confirming it was sourced from the Security Configuration (Step 0 extraction) and successfully used in Step 3.
